zh.lifeSummary: 當Jonet Stradling於大約1408年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托時，她的父親Edward Stradling20歲，母親Margaret de ros20歲。她和Ithel Ap Howel Davis至少有4個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1478年在威爾士布洛可爾騰比享年71歲。

nameMeanings.name: Stradling
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Strättlingen near Thun in Switzerland. The English landed family bearing this name, with a seat at Saint Donats (Glamorgan), traces its origins to John de Estratlinges (died c. 1293), who came to England from Switzerland with Otto de Grandison, Edward I's companion-in-arms.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Jonet Stradling was born about 1408, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Edward Stradling, was 20 and her mother, Margaret de ros, was 20. She had at least 4 sons and 1 daughter with Ithel Ap Howel Davis. She died in 1478, in Tenby, Pembrokeshire, Wales, at the age of 71.

Elle a eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille avec Ithel Ap Howel Davis. Elle est décédée en 1478, à Tenby, Pembrokeshire, Galles, à l’âge de 71 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Jonet Stradling(이)가 대략 1408년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Stradling(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de ros(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Ithel Ap Howel Davis(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1478년 웨일스 p브로케실르 텐비에서 71세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jonet Stradling родилась около 1408 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Edward Stradling было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de ros, 20. У неё было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь от Ithel Ap Howel Davis. Она умерла в 1478 г. в местности тенби, пемброкешир, Уэльс в возрасте 71 год.
